candidate_summary: BOWL-PARTIAL: K parallel decoders at golden-angle-divided phase offsets in (T, top-p, rep-penalty) decoder strategy space + judge selection over modal samples

results.title: Optimizing Temperature for LMs with Multi-Sample Inference TURN (2025/02)
results.rationale: TURN directly addresses temperature optimization for multi-sample inference with aggregation — covers two core components (strategy-space parameter, multi-sample). All three criteria triggered.

results.title: Diverse Beam Search (2016)
results.rationale: DBS is the canonical precedent for K-decoder diverse-coverage; the candidate itself names DBS as prior art. All three criteria triggered.

results.title: Arithmetic Sampling Parallel Diverse Decoding (Vilnis ICML 2023)
results.rationale: Arithmetic Sampling = parallel diverse decoding via deterministic low-discrepancy spacing — functionally equivalent to golden-angle coverage. All three criteria triggered.

results.title: Judge Decoding (ICLR 2025)
results.rationale: Judge Decoding directly covers the 'judge-selection over modal samples' pillar. All three criteria triggered.

results.title: Thorough Examination of Decoding Methods (EMNLP 2024)
results.rationale: Comprehensive decoding-methods survey covers the design space, including diverse parallel sampling strategies.

results.title: Faster Cheaper Better Multi-Objective HPO LLM+RAG (2025/02)
results.rationale: Multi-objective HPO over LLM configurations covers the strategy-space coverage component (sem and func both above threshold).

results.title: LLM Self-Regulation via Hyperparameter Optimization (ACL 2024)
results.rationale: Self-regulating HPO covers adaptive decoder strategy selection (sem and func meet threshold).

results.title: HPO For LLMs Advanced Strategies (Neptune)
results.rationale: Low-discrepancy sampling (Sobol/Halton) for HPO is functionally equivalent to golden-angle coverage of strategy space. Meets sem and func thresholds.

verdict_reasoning: Total hits = 8, far exceeds threshold of 1. The candidate is a clear recombination of well-established prior art: TURN (multi-sample temperature optimization), Diverse Beam Search (K-decoder diverse coverage), Arithmetic Sampling (parallel diverse decoding via deterministic spacing), Judge Decoding (judge selection over samples), plus standard low-discrepancy HPO. All three pillars (K-decoder strategy-space phase offset, golden-angle coverage, judge-selection over modal samples) are covered by existing literature. The candidate's own novelty_claim concedes recombination of existing components.
agreement_with_original: Concur with original 06_5_semantic_hits.json and 06_7_functional_hits.json findings (8/8 hits each). Independent re-scoring confirms FAIL.
